subject: physics
title: 17M.1.SL.TZ1.28
question_html:
The following are energy sources.

I.    a battery of rechargeable electric cells
II.   crude oil
III.  a pumped storage hydroelectric system

Which of these are secondary energy sources?

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
